bead.title: ts-sdk-tenant-database-api: fluent .tenant(t).database(d) API
bead.acceptance:
- [ ] sdk/typescript/src/http-client.ts with HttpAxonClient, TenantClient, DatabaseClient, AxonHttpError
- [ ] Fluent API: client.tenant(t).database(d).createEntity/getEntity/etc.
- [ ] All URLs have /tenants/:t/databases/:d/ prefix
- [ ] Bearer token support via options.authToken
- [ ] AxonHttpError extracts error code from response body
- [ ] Exported from index.ts
- [ ] sdk/typescript/test/http-client.test.ts with 7 tests
- [ ] bun test (or npm test) passes
- [ ] Type check passes
- [ ] Existing gRPC AxonClient unchanged
